sentences.arabic: تَهْتَمُّ الدُّوَلُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ كَثِيرًا بِالِابْتِكَارِ وَالتِّقْنِيَّةِ الْحَدِيثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapske zemlje se mnogo zanimaju za inovacije i modernu tehnologiju.
sentences.translationEn: Arab countries are very interested in innovation and modern technology.

sentences.arabic: بَنَتْ مَدِينَةُ دُبَي مَرَاكِزَ كَبِيرَةً لِلْأَبْحَاثِ وَالتَّطْوِيرِ الرَّقْمِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Grad Dubai je izgradio velike centre za istraživanje i digitalni razvoj.
sentences.translationEn: Dubai city built large centers for research and digital development.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاهِمُ الشَّبَابُ الْعَرَبُ فِي صِنَاعَةِ تَطْبِيقَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ وَمُفِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Arapska omladina doprinosi stvaranju novih i korisnih aplikacija.
sentences.translationEn: Arab youth contribute to creating new and useful applications.
